headline: Apple Hires Away Meta's Key Augmented Reality Employee, Ramping Up Efforts For AR Headset Release: Report
summary: A new report indicates that Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) has hired away a key employee from Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: FB) ahead of the anticipated release of an Augmented Reality (AR) headset by the iPhone maker.<

headline: Ray Dalio Says Bitcoin Will Not Hit $1M, Calls Elon Musk Plan To Put Dogecoin On The Moon 'Cute'
summary: Ray Dalio, the founder of the world's largest hedge fund, Bridgewater Associates, says that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) will not be able to reach the $1 million mark as he thinks it will not surpass gold.

headline: 'Spider-Man: No Way Home' Passes The $1B Mark In Global Ticket Sales

headline: Apple Said to have Hired Meta's AR Communications Head Andrea Schubert to Prepare for its Own Headset Launch
Will Dogecoin Or Shiba Inu Grow More In 2022?
summary: Every week, Benzinga conducts a survey to collect sentiment on what traders are most excited about, interested in or thinking about as they manage and build their personal portfolios.
